# Issue #8827: Add spatial shape constraint docs and validation for DiNTS (#6771)
**Repository:** Project-MONAI/MONAI
**Author:** Cado87
**Status:** closed
**Created At:** 2026-04-13T15:57:14Z

## Description
Fixes #6771 .

### Description

Adds spatial shape constraint documentation and runtime validation for `DiNTS`.
Each input spatial dimension must be divisible by `2 ** (num_depths + int(use_downsample))`.
Previously only a `print()` warning existed in `TopologyConstruction.__init__` — no error was raised.
This PR adds `_check_input_size()` to `DiNTS`, calls it in `forward()`, updates the class docstring
with a `Spatial Shape Constraints` section, and adds tests for both 3D and 2D invalid inputs.


### Types of changes
<!--- Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply, and remove the not applicable items -->
- [x] Non-breaking change (fix or new feature that would not break existing functionality).
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or new feature that would cause existing functionality to change).
- [x] New tests added to cover the changes.
- [ ] Integration tests passed locally by running `./runtests.sh -f -u --net --coverage`.
- [ ] Quick tests passed locally by running `./runtests.sh --quick --unittests  --disttests`.
- [x] In-line docstrings updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated, tested `make html` command in the `docs/` folder.

## Comments
### Comment by coderabbitai[bot] at 2026-04-13T15:57:31Z
<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: summarize by coderabbit.ai -->
<!-- walkthrough_start -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## Walkthrough

Added input-size validation to DiNTS: the constructor now checks that a provided `dints_space` object's `use_downsample` attribute matches the `use_downsample` argument and raises `ValueError` on mismatch. Introduced a private `@torch.jit.unused` helper `DiNTS._check_input_size(spatial_shape)` that computes the required divisibility factor `2 ** (num_depths + int(use_downsample))` and raises `ValueError` listing offending spatial dimensions. `DiNTS.forward(x)` calls this helper at runtime when not scripting/tracing. Docstrings and comments updated to document `use_downsample`'s effect. Tests adjusted and new tests added to assert invalid 2D/3D spatial sizes raise `ValueError`.

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 2 (Simple) | ⏱️ ~10 minutes

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
